NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL ON APR-22-2013 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT PROPOSED JUDGMENT WITHIN FIVE (5) DAYS. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LEWIS GILLIAN, CSR#12355. (514)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 245 LEAVENWORTH STREET, LP RECOVER FROM DEPONENT RUTT, LORING AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 245 LEAVENWORTH STREET, #26, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102 $6,278.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,278.00, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT TO ACCRUE INTEREST AT THE LEGAL RATE UNTIL PAID. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE A MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND ATTORNEY FEES WITHIN 10 DAY OF TODAY'S DATE. SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-22-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-22-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Lewis Gillian, #11288.

Daniel R. Stern, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff 245 Leavenworth Stree, LP.
Josh Pevet sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Lorin Rutt.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 245 Leavenworht Street, Unit 25, San Francisco, CA 94102.
Damages $6,278.00
Attorney's Fees and Costs if any to be determined by filing of Memorandum of Costs and fees within ten (10) days.
for a Total Judgment of $6,278.00.
Counsel for Plaintiff to submit a proposed Judgment within five days.
